title: SOC Incident Investigations
description: A documented walkthrough of simulated SOC incidents — from alert triage in the SIEM through containment and lessons-learned reporting — modeled on real-world Tier 1/2 analyst workflows.

title: Detection Engineering Rule Library
description: A version-controlled library of Sigma detection rules mapped to MITRE ATT&CK, with test cases and notes on tuning for false-positive reduction across common attacker techniques.

title: Threat Hunting Playbooks
description: Hypothesis-driven threat hunts built from MISP indicators and Suricata/Snort telemetry, packaged as repeatable playbooks a SOC team could run on a recurring schedule.

title: Splunk Lab: Enterprise Log Pipeline
description: A home-lab Splunk deployment ingesting endpoint, firewall, and identity logs, with custom dashboards and correlation searches built to surface suspicious authentication activity.

title: Wazuh Lab: Endpoint & File Integrity Monitoring
description: A self-hosted Wazuh deployment configured for endpoint detection, file integrity monitoring, and CIS benchmark compliance checks across a small mixed Linux/Windows fleet.

title: DevSecOps Pipeline Platform
description: A GitLab CI/CD pipeline with security gates baked in: SAST with SonarQube, container scanning with Trivy, and secrets management with Vault, deploying to Kubernetes via ArgoCD.

title: Kubernetes Security Hardening
description: A hardened Kubernetes cluster baseline covering network policies, Pod Security Standards, RBAC least-privilege design, and runtime monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana.

title: Azure Security Baseline
description: A baseline Azure landing zone configured against CIS benchmarks, covering identity, network segmentation, logging, and alerting for common cloud misconfigurations.

title: PowerShell Automation Toolkit
description: A collection of PowerShell scripts for Windows environment hardening, scheduled log collection, and repetitive SOC triage tasks, packaged as a reusable module.

title: Security Scripts Collection
description: Utility Python and Bash scripts for recon, log parsing, and IOC enrichment — the small tools that speed up day-to-day security engineering work.
